title: curl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[7.61.1-34.el8_10.8]
- NTLM: force the connection to HTTP/1.1 (RHEL-73788)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.7]
* crypto: ensure crypto initialization works (RHEL-102601)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.6]
- libssh: Fix matching user-specified MD5 hex key (RHEL-94574)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.5]
- asyn-thread: fix EBADF regression (RHEL-85602)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.4]
- make up incomplete patch for host name wildcard checking (RHEL-5680)
- asyn-thread: issue CURL_POLL_REMOVE before closing socket (RHEL-85602)
full_text:
[7.61.1-34.el8_10.8]
- NTLM: force the connection to HTTP/1.1 (RHEL-73788)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.7]
* crypto: ensure crypto initialization works (RHEL-102601)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.6]
- libssh: Fix matching user-specified MD5 hex key (RHEL-94574)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.5]
- asyn-thread: fix EBADF regression (RHEL-85602)

[7.61.1-34.el8_10.4]
- make up incomplete patch for host name wildcard checking (RHEL-5680)
- asyn-thread: issue CURL_POLL_REMOVE before closing socket (RHEL-85602)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-17407.html
